target.title: fix(codex): keep owner-only tool schema stable
target.body:
Closes #76179.

## Behavior addressed
Codex app-server sessions should not start new native threads just because temporary per-turn owner authorization changes the visible owner-only tool catalog. Unauthorized turns must still fail closed if they try to execute owner-only tools.

## Root cause
The Codex app-server dynamic tool list was built from `senderIsOwner`. When a turn was temporarily downgraded, owner-only tools disappeared from the dynamic schema. Codex app-server fingerprints that schema for native thread compatibility, so a 74-tool owner catalog and 71-tool downgraded catalog forced thread rebinding even though the underlying session was the same.

## Fix
Add a narrow `retainUnauthorizedOwnerOnlyTools` option to the owner-only tool policy and opt into it only for Codex app-server dynamic tool construction. This keeps the thread-level schema stable while wrapping unauthorized owner-only execution with the existing fail-closed guard.

## Evidence
Environment: source checkout, Node `v22.22.0`, rebased onto current `upstream/main` after nearby Codex dynamic-tool changes landed.

Current PR head: `563ed9f1645f9586e4502dae676a9e0b90afbe66`  
Current base checked: `3b5d30b5fdfd2d9e1e2f1c97242444467dce53c0`

Commands run after rebase:

```sh
pnpm docs:list
git rebase upstream/main
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-policy.test.ts src/agents/pi-tools.owner-only-gating.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/schema-normalization-runtime-contract.test.ts
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/tool-policy.ts src/agents/tool-policy.test.ts src/agents/pi-tools.ts src/agents/pi-tools.owner-only-gating.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts
```

Focused test result:

```text
Test Files  6 passed (6)
Tests       241 passed (241)
Duration    27.17s
```

Formatter result:

```text
All matched files use the correct format.
```

Screenshots: not applicable; this is backend Codex runtime/tool-schema behavior. Terminal proof above covers the exact policy and app-server construction seams.

## Not tested
Live Feishu DM traffic and actual Codex native thread IDs were not exercised. The proof targets the deterministic policy and Codex app-server dynamic-tool construction paths that drive the reported thread churn.
target.author: stainlu
